mapper.sql: select approval.id, approval.approval_no as approvalNo, approval.app_id as appId, approval.biz_order_no as bizOrderNo, approval.biz_refund_no as bizRefundNo, approval.payment_order_id as paymentOrderId, po.pay_order_no as payOrderNo, approval.refund_order_id as refundOrderId, ro.refund_order_no as refundOrderNo, approval.refund_amount as refundAmount, approval.reason, approval.remark, approval.status, approval.workflow_apply_id as workflowApplyId, approval.workflow_process_instance_id as workflowProcessInstanceId, approval.workflow_process_definition_key as workflowProcessDefinitionKey, approval.workflow_apply_status as workflowApplyStatus, approval.workflow_apply_status_name as workflowApplyStatusName, approval.workflow_current_task_names as workflowCurrentTaskNames, approval.workflow_current_assignee_names as workflowCurrentAssigneeNames, approval.workflow_synced_at as workflowSyncedAt, approval.applicant_id as applicantId, approval.applicant_name as applicantName, approval.apply_time as applyTime, approval.reviewer_id as reviewerId, approval.reviewer_name as reviewerName, approval.review_reason as reviewReason, approval.review_time as reviewTime, approval.created_at as createTime, approval.updated_at as updateTime

from payment_refund_approval approval join payment_order po on po.id = approval.payment_order_id and po.tenant_id = approval.tenant_id left join payment_refund_order ro on ro.id = approval.refund_order_id and ro.tenant_id = approval.tenant_id
mapper.select: order by approval.created_at desc limit #{limit} offset #{offset}

select id, approval_no as approvalNo, business_order_id as businessOrderId, payment_order_id as paymentOrderId, refund_order_id as refundOrderId, biz_order_no as bizOrderNo, biz_refund_no as bizRefundNo, app_id as appId, refund_amount as refundAmount, reason, remark, status, workflow_apply_id as workflowApplyId, workflow_process_instance_id as workflowProcessInstanceId, workflow_process_definition_key as workflowProcessDefinitionKey, workflow_apply_status as workflowApplyStatus, workflow_apply_status_name as workflowApplyStatusName, workflow_current_task_names as workflowCurrentTaskNames, workflow_current_assignee_names as workflowCurrentAssigneeNames, workflow_synced_at as workflowSyncedAt, applicant_id as applicantId, applicant_name as applicantName, apply_time as applyTime, reviewer_id as reviewerId, reviewer_name as reviewerName, review_reason as reviewReason, review_time as reviewTime, tenant_id as tenantId, created_by as createdBy, created_at as createdAt, updated_by as updatedBy, updated_at as updatedAt, del_flag as delFlag from payment_refund_approval where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id} and del_flag = 0 for update

select id, approval_no as approvalNo, business_order_id as businessOrderId, payment_order_id as paymentOrderId, refund_order_id as refundOrderId, biz_order_no as bizOrderNo, biz_refund_no as bizRefundNo, app_id as appId, refund_amount as refundAmount, reason, remark, status, workflow_apply_id as workflowApplyId, workflow_process_instance_id as workflowProcessInstanceId, workflow_process_definition_key as workflowProcessDefinitionKey, workflow_apply_status as workflowApplyStatus, workflow_apply_status_name as workflowApplyStatusName, workflow_current_task_names as workflowCurrentTaskNames, workflow_current_assignee_names as workflowCurrentAssigneeNames, workflow_synced_at as workflowSyncedAt, applicant_id as applicantId, applicant_name as applicantName, apply_time as applyTime, reviewer_id as reviewerId, reviewer_name as reviewerName, review_reason as reviewReason, review_time as reviewTime, tenant_id as tenantId, created_by as createdBy, created_at as createdAt, updated_by as updatedBy, updated_at as updatedAt, del_flag as delFlag from payment_refund_approval where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and approval_no = #{approvalNo} and del_flag = 0 for update

select id, approval_no as approvalNo, business_order_id as businessOrderId, payment_order_id as paymentOrderId, refund_order_id as refundOrderId, biz_order_no as bizOrderNo, biz_refund_no as bizRefundNo, app_id as appId, refund_amount as refundAmount, reason, remark, status, workflow_apply_id as workflowApplyId, workflow_process_instance_id as workflowProcessInstanceId, workflow_process_definition_key as workflowProcessDefinitionKey, workflow_apply_status as workflowApplyStatus, workflow_apply_status_name as workflowApplyStatusName, workflow_current_task_names as workflowCurrentTaskNames, workflow_current_assignee_names as workflowCurrentAssigneeNames, workflow_synced_at as workflowSyncedAt, applicant_id as applicantId, applicant_name as applicantName, apply_time as applyTime, reviewer_id as reviewerId, reviewer_name as reviewerName, review_reason as reviewReason, review_time as reviewTime, tenant_id as tenantId, created_by as createdBy, created_at as createdAt, updated_by as updatedBy, updated_at as updatedAt, del_flag as delFlag from payment_refund_approval where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and app_id = #{appId} and biz_refund_no = #{bizRefundNo} and del_flag = 0 for update
